problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue may resolve Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
